title: epipactis pauciflora
intro: Epipactis pauciflora, also known as the few-flowered helleborine, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Epipactis pauciflora are said to include reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Epipactis pauciflora can be prepared as a tincture or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies in small quantities due to its potency.
